symbols.name: ActiveEntityQueryBase
symbols.summary: Provides a fluent DSL for building queries against an ActiveEntity entity. This DSL wraps the underlying ActiveEntity static methods (FindOne, FindAll, Exists, Count, ProjectAll, etc.) and ensures all results are returned as BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601 or BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.ResultPaged%601.

syntax.content: public abstract class ActiveEntityQueryBase where TEntity : ActiveEntity

symbols.name: Where(Expression>)
symbols.summary: Adds a filter to the query using a LINQ expression.

symbols.name: Where(ISpecification)
symbols.summary: Adds a filter to the query using a specification.

symbols.name: Where(params ISpecification[])
symbols.summary: Adds multiple filters to the query using specifications.

symbols.name: And(ISpecification)
symbols.summary: Combines the last filter with another specification using logical AND.

symbols.name: Or(ISpecification)
symbols.summary: Combines the last filter with another specification using logical OR.

symbols.name: Include(Expression>)
symbols.summary: Adds an include for eager loading of a navigation property.

symbols.name: OrderBy(Expression>)
symbols.summary: Orders the query results ascending by the given key selector.

symbols.name: OrderByDescending(Expression>)
symbols.summary: Orders the query results descending by the given key selector.

symbols.name: Skip(int)
symbols.summary: Skips the given number of results.

symbols.name: Take(int)
symbols.summary: Takes the given number of results.

syntax.content: protected abstract Task>> FindAllInternal(IEnumerable> specs, FindOptions options, CancellationToken ct)
protected abstract Task> FindAllPagedInternal(IEnumerable> specs, FindOptions options, CancellationToken ct)
protected abstract Task> FindOneInternal(IEnumerable> specs, FindOptions options, CancellationToken ct)
protected abstract Task> ExistsInternal(IEnumerable> specs, FindOptions options, CancellationToken ct)
protected abstract Task> CountInternal(IEnumerable> specs, FindOptions options, CancellationToken ct)
protected abstract Task>> ProjectAllInternal(IEnumerable> specs, Expression> selector, FindOptions options, CancellationToken ct)
protected abstract Task> ProjectAllPagedInternal(IEnumerable> specs, Expression> selector, FindOptions options, CancellationToken ct)

symbols.name: ToListAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes the query and returns all matching entities.

symbols.name: ToPagedListAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes the query and returns a paged result of matching entities.

symbols.name: FirstOrDefaultAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Returns the first matching entity or null if none found.

symbols.name: FirstAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Returns the first matching entity or fails with BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.NotFoundError if none found.

symbols.name: AnyAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Returns true if any entity matches the query.

symbols.name: CountAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Returns the count of entities matching the query.

symbols.name: ProjectAllAsync(Expression>, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Projects all matching entities into a new shape.

syntax.content: public Task>> ProjectAllAsync(Expression> projection, CancellationToken ct = default)

symbols.name: ProjectAllPagedAsync(Expression>, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Projects all matching entities into a new shape with paging.

syntax.content: public Task> ProjectAllPagedAsync(Expression> projection, CancellationToken ct = default)
